aka: The Wind that Blows in the Shadows of Flowers
trans_title: The Wind that Blows in the Shadows of Flowers
introduction: SYNOPSISLili who has been meeting with Tsang, ends their affair to marry Hyung-woo whom she has been engaged to. But when Hyung-woo fails to return from abroad for their marriage, she heads for their villa, extremely disappointed. In that evening, she is overpowered by Tsang and his friends and is assaulted by them. Meanwhile, Hyung-woo, who has been worried over his sterility finds out about Tsang and drags him out of the villa. Moments later, a gunshot is heard and Lili finds a body by the lake the next morning. She can only shake her head to questions from the police and even denies knowing the victim. When she visits Tsang in jail, she tells him that she only met him for sex, but she soon finds herself in front of the hotel where they spent time together.故事她遇到的莉莉清除了她和吴的关系。莉莉从外国回国后结婚，对他没有来到别墅感到失望。但是在半夜里，和她一起来的恶霸也遭到袭击。另一方面，当他被诊断为生下一个孩子的桑he时，他发现了他的存在，并把他从别墅里拉出来。过了一会儿，枪声响起，第二天，莉莉在湖上发现了一具尸体。调查员的问题是，他是否知道，礼来只能做这个把戏。莉莉陈参观监狱之间被困在见到她的人，只是因为性欲不是因为爱的，但她的脚被流浪的故事停止在离开酒店前一直陪着她措手不及。
